title: Argan and rosemary hair oil
subtitle: A lightweight scalp and length oil for all hair types
excerpt: A hair oil built on argan oil and sweet almond oil, scented with rosemary essential oil. Argan oil absorbs quickly without weighing hair down. Rosemary essential oil has a well-documented association with hair density in recent clinical research.
sourceNotes: Argan oil fatty acid and cosmetic properties: USDA AOCS fatty acid database. Rosemary essential oil for hair: Panahi and others, Rosmarinus officinalis for hair loss study (Skinmed, 2015, open access) and Tatiani Fukuda and others comparative study (2023). Essential oil safe usage rate for scalp application: Tisserand and Young, Essential Oil Safety (2nd ed., 2014).

recipe.batchNotes: Scale proportionally. Essential oil percentage stays at 2% of total formula weight.
recipe.shelfLifeNotes: Store in a cool dark place or the fridge. Argan oil is relatively stable (high oleic acid content) and keeps 12 months with proper storage. Discard if the oil develops an off smell.

glossaryTerms.definition: A preparation containing no water phase. This oil keeps 12 months without a preservative.

Apply a small amount to the inside of the elbow and leave for 24 hours before scalp use. Rosemary essential oil is a known potential irritant at higher concentrations; the patch test confirms the dilution is tolerated.

content.text: Argan oil is lighter than most oils used on hair. It absorbs quickly rather than sitting on the surface. Sweet almond oil extends the formula. Rosemary essential oil at 2% of formula weight matches the concentration used in recent studies on hair density. The scent is clean and herbal; it fades within an hour of application. This is an
formula, ready to use immediately and stable for 12 months.

items.prepNote: 2% of formula (approximately 20 drops); use ct. camphor variety for scalp application

content.text: Measure each ingredient into the dropper bottle. Fit the dropper top and roll gently to combine. Label with the date. Ready to use immediately.
on the inside of the elbow before applying to the scalp. Rosemary essential oil at 2% is safe for most people on scalp skin, but sensitivity varies.
Drop 4 to 6 drops onto the scalp and rub in for 2 minutes. Do this 3 to 4 times a week. Leave for 30 minutes before washing. A small amount can go through the ends too, left in for shine.
Store in a cool dark place. Argan oil is relatively stable; the blend keeps 12 months. Discard if an off smell develops.
